privileged_info_summary: The task audits anchor text on books.toscrape.com, a real public website explicitly designed as a sandbox for web scraping practice. Books.toscrape.com contains 1,000 books across 50 pages of listings plus 50+ genre categories, with a full internal link structure. Screaming Frog SEO Spider's 'All Inlinks' export includes an 'Anchor Text' column containing anchor data for exported links. The minimum row count of 50 links is reasonable for this site's structure.
